meetings.title: Dan / Nikola Bidmachine | Peaksel
meetings.notes: Nikola based in Serbia. Use Admob Waterfall & Bidding blended. Also trialing Google next gen SDK. Formats: nongaming Native/Interstitial, gaming Rewarded/Interstitial. Next steps: sharing contract with legal. Could be a good Beta waterfall partner.

meetings.title: Bidmachine / Viber
meetings.notes: Use GAM as adserver, 3 SDKs: Google, Meta & Liftoff. Liftoff generating £1m per quarter. Viber Exchange plugged in via oRTB. 80% impressions programmatic, 20% direct. Ad mix: 70% native, 15% IBV, 15% mRec. 2 partners in pipe currently, would explore Q1 2027. Decision criteria: Revenue (MRG, integration fee, performance) and markets we can deliver in.

meetings.title: Minute Media / Elsa
meetings.notes: Elsa said Axel Springer purchase has slowed commercial conversations. Will need to wait for the dust to settle.

meetings.title: SoundCloud / Ben
meetings.notes: Ben offered intro to head of monetisation. Very audio heavy vs display/video.

meetings.title: Trade House Media / Sinclair update
meetings.notes: Successfully re-pitched for Sinclair business. Looking to scope out £25k SDK work.

meetings.title: Paramount
meetings.notes: CTV focus, Freewheel + Springserve stack. Own Conduit integration layer into Magnite/AdX. CTV mostly sold out. Next: ops/tech call.

stage_progressed.name: Indirect TuneIn
stage_progressed.progression: Lead with Peer SDK → Sales Prospecting

stage_progressed.name: Indirect | Peaksel
stage_progressed.progression: Lead with Peer SDK → Sales Prospecting

stage_progressed.name: Indirect | BBC
stage_progressed.progression: Lead with Peer SDK → Sales Prospecting

meetings.title: Fever Labs call
meetings.notes: Big apps don't have biddable placements. Fever don't want open market. Atom tickets all direct sold.

meetings.title: Fandom / Noeleen Boyle
meetings.notes: Met at Beeler. Will connect to internal monetisation owner.

meetings.title: Beeler - Michael
meetings.notes: Caught up at Beeler. Planning follow up.

meetings.title: Beeler - fleeting hello
meetings.notes: Following up on LinkedIn.

meetings.title: Beeler - webview blocker
meetings.notes: Webview is a blocker for SDK. Need answer before product meeting.

meetings.title: Beeler - Dan intro
meetings.notes: Met Dan at Beeler. Setting up proper meeting.

meetings.title: Beeler - Leonor and Anthony Hitchings
meetings.notes: Anthony was presenting. Following up.

meetings.title: Beeler - brief meeting
meetings.notes: Very brief. Following up on LinkedIn.

meetings.title: Beeler - James
meetings.notes: Briefly met James. Following up for intro meeting.

meetings.title: Beeler - Sim (Warner Bros/Paramount)
meetings.notes: APAC demand a focus. Open to meeting end of June. EU regulatory sign-off pending.

meetings.title: Beeler - Sonia
meetings.notes: In London most Thursdays. Proposing meeting.

meetings.title: Trade House Media / Post Industria
meetings.notes: Use Post Industria (Pubmatic SDK). Need 25K dev work. Re-pitching Sinclair vs FreeStar. Awaiting result.

meetings.title: News Corp / Tim
meetings.notes: Tim promoted to Head of Ops. In-house mediation GAM+TAM+Ozone. Evaluating BidMachine parallel/cached bidding.

meetings.title: What3words product lead
meetings.notes: Starting ad monetisation. SDK size a concern. Open to Q3 launch.

meetings.title: Venatus / Sam
meetings.notes: No direct app inventory. Google MCN and curation via Index Exchange (Unity, Rovio).

meetings.title: 152 Media / Matias
meetings.notes: CRO only interested in buying traffic. No direct app access. Asked about oRTB/S2S.

meetings.title: Match Media Group / Gregg
meetings.notes: Google custom cards, Unity rewarded, Nimbus header bidding. Custom swipe-right format. Q3 decisions.

meetings.title: Match / Lisette
meetings.notes: Match acquired Sniffies. Introducing Dan to Greg Murphy.
